entry.title: New BOA GS11B80671 awarded to LCOR ALEXANDRIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY for the amount of $5,696,852.53

ns1:typeOfContractPricing.description: FIXED PRICE WITH ECONOMIC PRICE ADJUSTMENT

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED
